name: Awakening in Space: Robot Combat FPS

reviews.review_description:
This game was enjoyable as I played it. Few massive issues. Don’t give me an option to shut off the crappy music, if you force it on after 3 minutes into the game anyway. Really bad techno trash music. 
   On another note this game is literally a demo, and doesn’t have more than 30 minutes of gameplay, and zero point to go back to it. However; I feel if developers actually made a longer story, it may have some potential. 2 star rating as currently I shouldn’t have had to pay money for this. Seemed like a money grab, from a developer that actually has some talent. This title will be instantly refunded, as it couldn’t even have at least over 2 hours of gameplay.

This game could have been better,
 it was too short of a game. Too bad the game wasn't any longer than what it was it could have reached five stars

reviews.review_title: Good game. Laser guns are awesome
reviews.review_description: Talking with AI and AI Robot animations are nice. You have two types of weapons. I always hold a laser sword in my left hand and a laser gun in my right left. Keep up! I want more content. The price is very good for the content.

This VR game is an absolute thrill for fans of space horror. The atmosphere is downright terrifying, capturing the isolation and dread of being alone in the vast emptiness of space. It gave me major Dead Space vibes, with its perfect mix of eerie exploration and intense combat.

The variety of weapons adds depth to the gameplay, and every encounter with enemies is a pulse-pounding challenge. The level of detail in the ship is incredible, making every room feel alive and immersive. On top of that, the puzzles are well-designed, providing a welcome break from the action while keeping the tension high.

If you love survival horror and want to experience the fear firsthand in VR, this game is a must-play.
